specific_mechanism: Island biogeography: species number scales with island area as S=cA^z; immigration-extinction equilibrium sets diversity; small islands fragile
llm_application: LLM retrieval-context as island biogeography: each retrieved chunk is an 'island' with a species-area curve of relevant facts; immigration-extinction equilibrium sets effective retrieved knowledge.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes biogeography spectral-allocation mapping as proposed.
